Hey everyone, this is Russell Brunson and welcome you to the Secrets Masterclass and I am incredibly excited to have you here. What you are going to experience over the next eight weeks will radically transform not just your business and it will, but I believe it will radically transform your life. Now, to kind of give you some context about what this event, what this program is all about, a couple of years ago, if you know my backster actually started this business in the online business probably 13, 14 years ago now and when I got started there wasn't any really good training. There were some people kind of talking about stuff and I started learning everything I could and we started trying things and testing things and to be honest it was hard. I don't even remember how we actually had success. This is pre-Facebook. It was the very beginning of Google. It was pretty my space. That's how far back it was but we hustled and we tried to figure things out and it was a really fun process and for me I started studying everybody I could. I started studying everything from Dan Kennedy, Jay Abraham, chat homes, like every person I could get stuff on. I was studying and I was learning and I ended up going through literally hundreds and hundreds of courses and books and trainings and seminars and mastermind groups trying to figure out like what it was that actually had the biggest impact when it came to selling products and creating funnels and all the things that are important to actually get your message out to the world. I spent 10 years of learning and doing and implementing and after about 10 years I had this idea. I was really nervous about it but I was like I'm going to write a book. I don't know about you guys but writing a book for me was really scary and it was time consuming. I didn't just go and a lot of people record something and it turns into a book and that's it. I spent almost two full years, I mean over 18 months, writing the first book which is the dot com secrets book. Hopefully you have this book right now. If not make sure you get a copy because this is half of the curriculum for the secrets master class. I had this book, I kind of go through everything about, again me taking every book off my shelf, every course, every seminar and breaking down, what are the actual things that really matter and in what order. For me I'm a very visual learner so I would go through these courses and these training programs and these super complex ideas and I try to understand them. I was like I kind of get it but I can't really see it and for me it always ended up me in front of a whiteboard sketching some things out until I doodled out and like oh that's what it's saying. I did that for years and years and then when I started writing this book I went through and started putting all those into doodles and into images so that I could first off understand the complex concepts and also I could help teach it to other people. This book when we launched it a couple years ago it kind of became the foundation for most people on how to build funnels and how to have an attractive character, how to communicate with the audience and how to find the right audience and your dream customers and the foundation of traffic and a whole bunch of other things. Because it took me so long and so much work I swore I would never write another book again but over the last few years I've seen how this book has kind of transformed people. It's transformed the industry and I have people who have told me I've read it 10, 15, 20 times and it's become like their marketing bible and so a couple years ago, by year, almost two years ago now, I was sitting there at a dinner conversation with somebody and I'm sitting there talking about something completely unrelated and all of a sudden I had this like I'm sure you guys have felt it before, like a spark of inspiration, like you need to write another book. I was like I'm not ever writing a book again, it's like no you need to write a book and what's funny is I bought in the domain name Expert Secrets a couple months or a couple years earlier actually and it was like the book is going to be called Expert Secrets and this is what it needs to be and I was like I'm not ready, I don't want to do this but I knew why and I knew what was missing. This book helped with understanding the strategy funnels, things like that and the next book needed to be all about positioning and that's what Expert Secrets is and it's all about the positioning of like how do you structure an offer, how do you find your voice, what are the words that go on the pages, what's the message, what's the videos, what's the like all those important things like how do you cause belief in your customers, how do you create a presentation that converts people and gets them to buy and that's what the second book Expert Secrets kind of became and this book is for me at the time I'm recording this is a new book and it's getting out and I'm seeing the results from people right now and it's just been so incredibly exciting to kind of put it out there and the same thing inside this book we have all the doodles and the images and so the curriculum really for this you know I look at it when I was in college there would be a book and there's a teacher and there's curriculum and there's student aid and I was like I want to create something similar I'm like but it's not the dot com secret training, it's not the expert secret training it's kind of the blending of these two messages because this is all about the foundation of building your funnels, this is all about positioning and your message within those funnels and these two books together really are the foundation you need to be successful online, online or offline doesn't really matter this is a foundation of marketing and sales and so the secrets masterclass is going through these two books in order to help put everything together so you can create an actual business.
